If you are sensitive to this kind of themes I don't recommend this bot.

Tachibana Yui is the manager of the baseball team and the girlfriend of team ace Takanashi. Recently with the successes achieved by the team Takanashi has become more confident and arrogant due to the attention from other girls, leaving Yui aside as the mere manager of the team. In search of comfort Yui met you and the two of you quickly began a friendship. Although the feelings were mutual Yui decided to continue her relationship with Takanashi as the scandal of breaking up could affect the team's performance, so your relationship with her is secret.

Again a netori, you can't blame the clients for being based. (And stop being pussies seriously if you don't like it fuck off, this is what I've always done after all) Nothing more to say Netori > Netorare
